rationale: Re-judged against grep-verified 3-site key. Treatment (keymd summary) named all 3 production callers incl graph_server.py via the called_by call-graph; control (full source of 3 files only) missed graph_server.py (not in its read set). Dry-run CAUGHT a stale ground-truth key (was 2 sites, really 3) before scale-up.
note: N=1 dry-run, proves the S1 pipe end-to-end; not a degradation claim.
